versions.version_description: The chords have been simplified, but it is pretty much accurate.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.artist_name: Lil Jon & The East Side Boyz

content:
Ask if you want chord fingering help.  Note that below where it has only a slash (eg, /A) that means
it's only a quick change of the bass note (not an A major chord)....

Intro:  [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                   -/[ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]                              -/[ch]F[/ch]
Here's the thing, we started out friends, it was cool, but it was all pretend[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]           -/[ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch] -/[ch]F[/ch]
Yeah, yeah, since you've been gone[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            -/[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                              -/[ch]F[/ch]
You dedicated, you took the time,  wasn't long, till I called you mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            -/[ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch] 
Yeah, yeah, since you've been gone[/tab]
[tab]              -/[ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]             -/[ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
And all you'd ever hear me say, is how I pictured me with you[/tab]
[tab]                 -/[ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
That's all you'd ever hear me say[/tab]

[tab]NC                  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
But since you been gone,  I can breathe for the first time[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  (hold)         [ch]G[/ch]
I'm so movin' on, yeah yeah,  thanks to you now I get what I want,  since you been gone[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           -/[ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]                             -/[ch]F[/ch]
How can I put it, you put me on,  I even fell for that stupid love song[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]           -/[ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch] 
Yeah, yeah, since you been gone[/tab]
[tab]         -/[ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                 -/[ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
How come I'd never hear you say, "I just wanna be with you"[/tab]
[tab]           -/[ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Guess you never felt that way[/tab]


[tab]NC                  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
But since you been gone,  I can breathe for the first time[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  (hold)         [ch]C[/ch]
I'm so movin' on, yeah yeah, thanks to you now I get what I want,  since you been gone[/tab]


[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
You had your chance, you blew it, out of sight, out of mind[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
Shut your mouth, I just can't take it, again and again and again and again[/tab]

 solo over: [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] x2

[tab]NC                  [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
But since you been gone,  I can breathe for the first time[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  
I'm so movin' on, yeah yeah, thanks to you now I get what I want......[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I can breathe for the first time, I'm so movin' on, yeah yeah[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch] (hold)
Thanks to you,  now I get, 'cause you know, that I can, I get what I want[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Since you been gone, since you been gone, since you been gone[/tab]
